Field.Name: Firmware
Field.Description: The Software Package contains the firmware of a physical device.

Field.Name: Application
Field.Description: The Software Package contains an executable software.

Field.Name: Configuration
Field.Description: The Software Package contains the configuration of a device or application.

Field.Name: Solution
Field.Description: The Software Package contains a solution with several software package.

Field.Name: DeploymentItem
Field.Description: This file shall be deployed to the device. At most one file can be marked as DeploymentItem. If the complete Software Package is deployed to the device the individual files are not described explicitly.

Field.Name: ReleaseNotes
Field.Description: E.g. link for user to open the document.

Field.Name: LicenseInfo
Field.Description: E.g. link for user to open the document.

Field.Name: PreInstallNote
Field.Description: Text that shall be shown to the user at least once before installation.

Field.Name: RegularExpression
Field.Description: Value[0] contains a regular expression which must match the value of the Variable

Field.Name: OneOf
Field.Description: Value[0] contains a regular expression which must match the value of the Variable

Field.Name: Exist
Field.Description: The Node that is described by the Variable must exist. The Values array shall be empty
